result:
The data cleaning and preprocessing task has been completed successfully. The R script:

1. Loaded all 9 tab-delimited survey datasets from data/input/ using readr::read_delim()
2. Merged all datasets by the NSID variable using full_join()
3. Created detailed adolescent variables (hownteen14 through hownteen20) with 13 categories each, properly recoding source variables and handling missing values according to metadata specifications
4. Created collapsed/harmonized variables (hown14 through hown32) with 9 categories each
5. Applied appropriate factor labels to all variables
6. Selected only the required output variables (NSID, hown14-hown20, hown25, hown32, hownteen14-hownteen20)
7. Wrote the cleaned dataset to data/output/cleaned_data.csv

The output file contains 17 variables: the cohort identifier (NSID), 9 collapsed tenure variables (hown14, hown15, hown16, hown17, hown18, hown19, hown20, hown25, hown32), and 7 detailed adolescent tenure variables (hownteen14, hownteen15, hownteen16, hownteen17, hownteen18, hownteen19, hownteen20).
